meta.title: ohmyhf — Unofficial Hugging Face desktop client
meta.description: ohmyhf is an unofficial Hugging Face desktop client for browsing, downloading, and managing the Hub — fast, local, and private. Open source, Apache-2.0, for macOS, Windows, and Linux.

notFound.metaDescription: This page does not exist. Head back to ohmyhf — the unofficial Hugging Face desktop client.
notFound.title: This page isn’t on the Hub.
notFound.body: The URL may be mistyped, or the page moved. The desktop client is still where you left it.

hero.title: The Hugging Face desktop client that should have existed.
hero.subtitle: An unofficial, open-source app for browsing, downloading and managing the Hugging Face Hub — fast, local, private.
hero.badge: Apache-2.0 · macOS / Windows / Linux · No telemetry · English / 中文
hero.badgeReleased: v{version} · Apache-2.0 · macOS / Windows / Linux · No telemetry
hero.shotAlt: Oh My HuggingFace browse view: model list and live model card in a three-pane light window

pain.line: Twenty tabs. Endless reloads. A 300 GB cache folder you're afraid to open.

browse.title: Triple-pane browsing. Zero reloads.
browse.description: Sidebar, list, and live preview stay put while you switch Models, Datasets, Spaces, and Papers. Pick a repo and the right pane renders the model card instantly — no new tabs, no full-page reloads.
browse.shotAlt: Three-pane browse UI with a model list and live README card

filter.title: Narrow the Hub until one list remains.
filter.description: Open filters beside the model list: task, parameter size, library, and license. Clear all or hit Done — then keep browsing the same three panes. ⌘K is always there when you want to search everything.
filter.shotAlt: Filter panel with task, parameter, library, and license chips

files.title: Open the file tree. Preview configs in place.
files.description: Switch to Files on any repo: walk folders, select a weight or config.json, and read it in the side preview — without leaving the desktop window or dumping another browser tab.
files.shotAlt: Files tab showing a repo tree and config.json preview

home.title: A home feed — and trending on the side.
home.description: Follow people and orgs, skim posts in the center, and keep an eye on trending models, datasets, and spaces in the right rail. Library items like favorites, downloads, and cache live in the same sidebar.
home.shotAlt: Home feed with posts and a trending sidebar

spaces.title: Spaces as a gallery, not a pile of tabs.
spaces.description: Browse running Spaces in a card grid with status and likes, then open one when you’re ready. The detail pane waits until you pick — same three-pane rhythm as Models.
spaces.shotAlt: Spaces gallery with colorful Space cards

datasetPreview.title: Preview dataset rows before you download anything.

prFiles.title: Full PR review — diffs, comments, and all.
prFiles.alt: Pull request files-changed view with diffs

spaceRunner.title: Run a Space right inside the app.
spaceRunner.alt: A running Space open in its Run tab

userProfile.title: Public profiles — repos, papers, and activity.

postPage.title: Read community posts in place.
postPage.alt: A community post opened in its own page

settingsModal.title: Account, network, privacy — every setting, one modal.
settingsModal.alt: Settings modal with account, network, and privacy sections

inbox.title: Deeper inbox
inbox.description: Richer follow notifications for users, orgs, repos, and Daily Papers — tuned so the signal stays useful.

compare.title: Richer compare
compare.description: Side-by-side model compare with more metadata and benchmarks, so picking a checkpoint stays a glance.

toolchain.title: Local AI toolchain
toolchain.description: Push GGUF into Ollama or LM Studio, send models to ComfyUI, and run an in-app inference playground — without leaving the desktop.

openSource.title: Open source
openSource.description: Apache-2.0 licensed. Read the code, fork it, audit it — the full repository is public on GitHub.

privacy.title: Privacy-first
privacy.description: Everything stays local in SQLite. No telemetry. OAuth tokens are stored with OS-level encryption — never in plaintext. Downloads write to the standard Hugging Face cache, with a visualizer to reclaim disk.

crossPlatform.title: Cross-platform
crossPlatform.description: Native builds for macOS, Windows, and Linux. Resumable, parallel downloads with sha256 checks and system notifications — plus in-app updates from GitHub Releases.

download.title: Download ohmyhf
download.versionLinePrefix: Latest release: v{version}. Installers and checksums come from the
download.notice: First release is on its way — watch the repo to get notified.
download.unsignedPrefix: Unsigned build for now — see the

official.q: Is this an official Hugging Face app?
official.a: No. ohmyhf is an unofficial open-source project. It is not affiliated with, associated with, or endorsed by Hugging Face, Inc. “Hugging Face” is a trademark of Hugging Face, Inc., used here for identification purposes only.

free.a: Yes. The app is free and open source under the Apache-2.0 license. You can use it, study it, and contribute without paying a fee.

safety.q: Are my data and tokens safe?
safety.a: All app data stays on your machine in a local SQLite database. Tokens are stored with OS-level encryption, never in plaintext. There is no telemetry, and the source is public so you can audit what runs.

platforms.a: ohmyhf targets macOS, Windows, and Linux. Builds ship as dmg, exe installer, and AppImage / deb, with in-app updates from GitHub Releases.

cache.q: Is the cache compatible with huggingface-cli and transformers?
cache.a: Yes. Downloads write to the standard Hugging Face cache layout. Models and datasets you fetch in ohmyhf work with huggingface-cli, transformers, and other tools that expect that layout.

contribute.a: We welcome issues, pull requests, and translations. Start with the contributing guide in the repository — it covers setup, coding standards, and how to propose changes.

footer.disclaimer: This is an unofficial open-source project, not affiliated with, associated with, or endorsed by Hugging Face, Inc. “Hugging Face” is a trademark of Hugging Face, Inc., used here for identification purposes only.
footer.notAffiliated: Not affiliated with Hugging Face, Inc.
